purpose: Controls when pending evidence packets in Memories/inbox should be reviewed by a semantic consolidation task.

promotionRules.userExplicitStatement: May be promoted when source sentence is preserved and reviewed.
promotionRules.gitObservedChange: May support project fact or bug_fix only after semantic review.
promotionRules.aiCandidateSummary: Never promote directly; use only as a hint during review.
promotionRules.ruleBasedTags: Never promote directly; use only for triage.
